issues.sample: An 'amber' airbag malfunction light has illuminated on the instrument panel.  The airbag light has since turned 'red'.  It is 'red' to this date. The manufacturers guide advises to take the vehicle to the dealer. The authorized Cadillac dealer in our town troubleshot the problem

Initial repair of the vehicle was initiated on 9/12/25 due to a dashboard warning message indicating an air bag system fault.  The Cadillac dealership was unable to complete the repair during the initial service visit.  The vehicle was returned to the dealership in October 2025 a

narrative.headline: What 2016 Cadillac Elr owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (100% of reports).
